name: Security contact request
about: Request a private path for reporting a security-sensitive issue without posting exploit details.

labels: [security]
---

Do not include exploit details, secrets, tokens, or private proof-of-concept material here.

## Request

Please provide a private channel for a security-sensitive report.

## Minimal context

- Affected area (high level only):
- Why public disclosure is unsafe:
- Preferred contact method (if any):

For full policy details, see `SECURITY.md`.
